ValidationRule.description: Require the user go through the Closed Lost flow when marking an opportunity closed lost.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(Closed_Lost_Checkbox__c), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") ,RecordType.Id='012Dn000000mrO3IAI' ) /* Update 7/21/25: This is now controlled by the Closed Lost screen flow. This flow checks a checkbox and which THEN allows the Opportunity to be Closed Lost. Otherwise, there is no way to close an opportunity (e.g. through the timeline/chevron). */
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please use the Close Opportunity button (top-right) to close an opportunity.
